title: SpaceRole enum as validated type at store boundary
description: SpaceMemberOp::Upsert and upsert_space_member_with_role now take SpaceRole instead of &str. This is correct: validated types belong at the API boundary, not buried in a precondition doc comment. A future contributor adding a new call site cannot accidentally pass an arbitrary string — the compiler rejects it. Resist any suggestion to revert this to &str for 'flexibility'; the flexibility would be the ability to write invalid roles to the database.
close_reason: Fixed in code; decision records documented
